nasb.text: he is not to honor his father or his mother.’ And by this you invalidated the word of God for the sake of your tradition.

esv.text: he need not honor his father.’ So for the sake of your tradition you have made void the word  of God.

cnv.text: 他就可以不孝敬父母了。’你們因為你們的傳統，就廢棄了　神的話。

ccb.text: 他就不必供养父母。’你们这是用传统来废掉上帝的诫命。

csbs.text: 他就可以完全不孝敬父母。’这样，为了你们的传统，你们就废弃了神的话语。
